entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A seed-bearing plant (Arachis hypogaea L) targeted for transgenic development for resistance to Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus that groundnut transgenics are being developed to resist

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or defend against a pathogen like Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: LEGUMINOSAE
entities.description: A family of angiosperms including pulses, important for human nutrition, pasture, and fodder

entities.name: ANGIOSPERMS
entities.description: Flowering plants to which the Leguminosae family belongs

entities.name: PEAS
entities.description: Protein-rich seed-bearing plants belonging to the Leguminosae family

entities.name: LENTILS
entities.description: Protein-rich seed-bearing plants belonging to the Leguminosae family

entities.name: BEANS
entities.description: Protein-rich seed-bearing plants belonging to the Leguminosae family

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Collective term for protein-rich seed-bearing plants like peas, lentils, and beans

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grain-bearing plants that dominate the food sector compared to pulses

entities.name: BREEDING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Classical and modern techniques used to interchange desirable characters in crops

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: A potential supplement to breeding technologies for crop improvement

entities.name: PLANT TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: A biotechnological advance used for crop improvement

entities.name: GENETIC TRANSFORMATION METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to introduce genetic material into plants for improvement

entities.name: MOLECULAR BIOLOGY TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used in conjunction with gene isolation for crop improvement

entities.name: GENE ISOLATIONS
entities.description: The process of identifying and extracting specific genes for crop improvement

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall goal of increasing the quality and quantity of crops
